title: We’ve made looking up Assets objects in Automation easier
description: You can now use filters to generate an AQL query when using the Lookup objects action in Automation. Simply select Basic to choose an object type plus any attributes, and an AQL query will be generated for you. This query will use attributes as placeholders for you to then customize with relevant smart values. The results of this query can also be used in other Automation actions using the lookupObjects smart value. Read more about using smart values for Assets.
